title: COIB — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Conflicts of Interest Board (COIB) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the COIB Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/coib, and the login-gated Annual Financial Disclosure filing website. Includes the NYC geography spine (carried only by the Legal Defense Trust Expenditures dataset) and the shared money/filer references used across enforcement, donations, and disclosure objects.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

PostalAddress.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (address.json#/$defs/Address); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/PostalAddress still resolve.

Money.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Money still resolve.

AgencyReference.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (party.json#/$defs/AgencyReference); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/AgencyReference still resolve.

FilerReference.description: A reference to a public servant or filer (name + title + agency). Used by the Policymakers List and the net-new Financial Disclosure filing.
